implementation_notes: Change 1: Widened the upgrade condition in _hybrid_fallback() at lines 2060-2071 of coach_validator.py. The original condition only checked 'No completion promise' in promise_cr.evidence. The new condition explicitly requires promise_cr.result == 'rejected' AND checks for either 'No completion promise' OR 'Promise status: incomplete' in the evidence. This allows file-existence promises that a Player marked as incomplete to be upgraded by text matching against requirements_addressed. Change 2: Added 3 new tests to TestHybridMatchingFallback in test_run3_stall_fixes.py. test_hybrid_fallback_upgrades_file_existence_incomplete confirms the new 'Promise status: incomplete' path is upgraded. test_hybrid_fallback_upgrades_no_completion_promise confirms the original 'No completion promise' path still works. test_hybrid_fallback_does_not_upgrade_explicit_reject confirms that arbitrary rejection evidence (e.g., 'Player explicitly stated: not implementing caching') is NOT upgraded even when text matching would succeed.
requirements_addressed: Widen _hybrid_fallback() upgrade condition to also match 'Promise status: incomplete' evidence
Preserve existing 'No completion promise' upgrade behaviour
Add explicit promise_cr.result == 'rejected' guard to the condition
Update inline comment to describe both upgrade triggers
Add test: file-existence incomplete promises allow text upgrade
Add test: original No-completion-promise upgrade still works
Add test: explicit player rejection is NOT overridden by text

completion_promises.criterion_text: Modify _hybrid_fallback() upgrade condition to also cover 'Promise status: incomplete'
completion_promises.evidence: Updated elif condition at lines 2060-2071 in coach_validator.py to add promise_cr.result == 'rejected' guard and OR clause for 'Promise status: incomplete'. Updated inline comment to describe both triggers.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Add test: file-existence incomplete promises allow text upgrade

completion_promises.criterion_text: Add test: original 'No completion promise' upgrade still works
completion_promises.evidence: Added test_hybrid_fallback_upgrades_no_completion_promise to TestHybridMatchingFallback. Asserts criteria_met==1, all_criteria_met==True, and '[Text fallback]' in evidence.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Add test: explicit player rejection is NOT overridden by text
completion_promises.evidence: Added test_hybrid_fallback_does_not_upgrade_explicit_reject to TestHybridMatchingFallback. Asserts criteria_met==0, all_criteria_met==False, and criterion remains in missing list.
